title: Implement land and sea management practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement land and sea management practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine Indigenous land and sea management practices

pcs.text: Identify and follow cultural protocols when discussing and evaluating Indigenous land and sea management practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow cultural protocols when discussing and evaluating Indigenous land and sea management practices.
